name: moto-math-variant
description: MOTO S.T.E.M. Mathematics Variant - Autonomous ASI Research System for Novel S.T.E.M. Mathematical Paper Generation

scripts.dev:backend: python -c "import os, uvicorn; uvicorn.run('backend.api.main:app', host=os.getenv('MOTO_BACKEND_HOST', os.getenv('HOST', '0.0.0.0')), port=int(os.getenv('MOTO_BACKEND_PORT', os.getenv('PORT', '8000'))), reload=True, access_log=False)"
